ddls:
CREATE TABLE "brands" (
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each brand */,
  "brand_name" TEXT /* Name of the brand */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry the brand belongs to */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries related to the brand */,
  "brand_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the brand */,
  "brand_category" TEXT /* Category of the brand */,
  "brand_website" TEXT /* Website URL of the brand */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ads" (
  "ad_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ad */,
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the brand that created the ad */,
  "ad_title" TEXT /* Title of the ad */,
  "ad_length_sec" INTEGER /* Length of the ad in seconds */,
  "ad_type" TEXT /* Type of ad (e.g., video, banner, social media) */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date when the ad was released */,
  "ad_format" TEXT /* Format of the ad (e.g., image, video, carousel) */,
  "target_audience" TEXT /* Target audience for the ad */,
  "call_to_action" TEXT /* Call-to-action text for the ad */,
  "landing_page_url" TEXT /* URL of the landing page associated with the ad */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ad_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ads_brand_id FOREIGN KEY ("brand_id") REFERENCES brands ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "campaigns" (
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each campaign */,
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the brand that owns the campaign */,
  "campaign_name" TEXT /* Name of the campaign */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the campaign */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the campaign */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated to the campaign */,
  "campaign_objective" TEXT /* Objective of the campaign (e.g., brand awareness, lead generation) */,
  "target_location" TEXT /* Target location for the campaign */,
  "target_devices" TEXT /* Target devices for the campaign (e.g., mobile, desktop) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("campaign_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_campaigns_brand_id FOREIGN KEY ("brand_id") REFERENCES brands ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ad_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "ad_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the ad being measured */,
  "views" INTEGER /* Total number of views the ad received */,
  "percent_viewed" REAL /* Percentage of the ad viewed by users */,
  "viewing_time_sec" REAL /* Total viewing time in seconds */,
  "attentive_sec_per_1000_impressions" REAL /* Attentive seconds per 1000 impressions */,
  "click_through_rate" REAL /* Click-through rate (CTR) of the ad */,
  "conversion_rate" REAL /* Conversion rate of the ad */,
  "cost_per_click" REAL /* Cost per click (CPC) of the ad */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ad_performance_ad_id FOREIGN KEY ("ad_id") REFERENCES ads ("ad_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "viewers" (
  "viewer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each viewer */,
  "viewer_name" TEXT /* Name of the viewer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the viewer */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group of the viewer (e.g., 18-24, 25-34) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the viewer */,
  "preferences" TEXT /* Viewer preferences regarding ads */,
  "viewer_interests" TEXT /* Interests of the viewer */,
  "viewer_behavior" TEXT /* Behavior of the viewer (e.g., frequent buyer, occasional buyer) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("viewer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "viewer_engagement" (
  "engagement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each engagement record */,
  "viewer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the viewer who engaged with the ad */,
  "ad_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the ad that was engaged with */,
  "engagement_type" TEXT /* Type of engagement (e.g., click, share, like) */,
  "engagement_date" TEXT /* Date of the engagement event */,
  "engagement_value" INTEGER /* Value of the engagement (e.g., likes, shares, comments) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("engagement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_viewer_engagement_ad_id FOREIGN KEY ("ad_id") REFERENCES ads ("ad_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_viewer_engagement_viewer_id FOREIGN KEY ("viewer_id") REFERENCES viewers ("viewer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ad_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ad type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the ad type (e.g., Video, Banner) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the ad type */,
  "type_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the ad type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ad_channels" (
  "channel_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ad channel */,
  "channel_name" TEXT /* Name of the channel (e.g., TV, Social Media) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the ad channel */,
  "channel_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the ad channel */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("channel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "campaign_analysis" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis record */,
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the campaign being analyzed */,
  "total_views" INTEGER /* Total views across all ads in the campaign */,
  "total_engagements" INTEGER /* Total engagements across all ads in the campaign */,
  "average_viewing_time" REAL /* Average viewing time for ads in the campaign */,
  "total_budget" REAL /* Total budget spent on the campaign */,
  "return_on_ad_spend" REAL /* Return on ad spend (ROAS) for the campaign */,
  "return_on_investment" REAL /* Return on investment (ROI) for the campaign */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_campaign_analysis_campaign_id FOREIGN KEY ("campaign_id") REFERENCES campaigns ("campaign_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ad_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ad version */,
  "ad_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the ad being versioned */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the ad */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of this version */,
  "changes" TEXT /* Description of changes made in this version */,
  "version_status" TEXT /* Status of the ad version (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ad_versions_ad_id FOREIGN KEY ("ad_id") REFERENCES ads ("ad_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., admin, analyst) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with this role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user's role */,
  "user_status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ad_channel_usage" (
  "usage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each usage record */,
  "ad_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the ad being used */,
  "channel_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the channel used for the ad */,
  "impressions" INTEGER /* Number of impressions on this channel */,
  "spend" REAL /* Amount spent on the ad in this channel */,
  "usage_status" TEXT /* Status of the ad channel usage (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("usage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ad_channel_usage_channel_id FOREIGN KEY ("channel_id") REFERENCES ad_channels ("channel_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ad_channel_usage_ad_id FOREIGN KEY ("ad_id") REFERENCES ads ("ad_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "budget_allocations" (
  "allocation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each budget allocation record */,
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the campaign that received the allocation */,
  "amount_allocated" REAL /* Amount of budget allocated to the campaign */,
  "allocation_date" TEXT /* Date of allocation */,
  "allocation_status" TEXT /* Status of the budget allocation (e.g., allocated, pending) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("allocation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_budget_allocations_campaign_id FOREIGN KEY ("campaign_id") REFERENCES campaigns ("campaign_id")
)
